text: Then, it’s dinner time. The students gather in the ship’s mess hall.

speaker: Diederich
text: Some students are still laid-up with seasickness. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Give 'em a break. Most of ‘em have never been out to sea before. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Guess there’s not much we can do about that. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: “Listen up everyone! I’m Ludvigo’s dragon, the great Baten! Remember that!”

speaker: Baten
text: Derich’s an old pal of mine! I just happened to be passin' by Frontail, which is why you’re on the ship now. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: But this ain’t a free ride! Yer gonna work for me! Those who don’t work don’t eat! *

speaker: Diederich
text: Your exam scores will be determined by the way you work startin' tomorrow.

speaker: Baten
text: You got that? Then start eatin'! The fun starts tomorrow! *

speaker: Lord Baten
text: With Lord Baten’s permission, the students begin to slowly eat the food placed in front of them.

speaker: Unknown
text: But after a brief puking session, they don’t seem very enthusiastic about it. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Gimmie a break. They’re gonna be useless…

speaker: Baten
text: You better make damn sure you do. I didn’t agree to a pleasure cruise. *sigh*
